Geographic granularities

01

### County

All Norwegian counties, in multiple layouts and coordinate systems.

02

### Municipality

Full municipal maps for the 2024, 2020, 2019 & 2017 redistricting.

03

### City ward

Detailed Oslo *bydeler* for fine-grained urban reporting.

Map gallery

![County map of Norway](gallery/county.png)

County · b2024 default

![Municipality map of Norway](gallery/municip.png)

Municipality · b2024

![Oslo ward map](gallery/oslo_ward.png)

Oslo wards · b2024

## Overview

csmaps provides preformatted maps of Norway that generally do not need
geolibraries, for public-health reporting at county, municipality, and
Oslo-ward level. It is convenient to visualise maps with additional
information, either using text labels or colour palettes.

Read the introduction vignette
[here](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/articles/csmaps.md) or run
[`help(package = "csmaps")`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference).

# Package index

## County-level maps

Maps of Norwegian counties with different layouts and coordinate systems

- [`nor_county_map_b2024_default_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_default_dt.md)
  [`nor_county_map_b2020_default_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_default_dt.md)
  [`nor_county_map_b2019_default_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_default_dt.md)
  [`nor_county_map_b2017_default_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_default_dt.md)
  [`nor_county_position_geolabels_b2024_default_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_default_dt.md)
  [`nor_county_position_geolabels_b2020_default_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_default_dt.md)
  [`nor_county_position_geolabels_b2019_default_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_default_dt.md)
  [`nor_county_position_geolabels_b2017_default_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_default_dt.md)
  : Maps of Norwegian counties in data.table format
- [`nor_county_map_b2024_default_sf`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_default_sf.md)
  [`nor_county_map_b2020_default_sf`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_default_sf.md)
  [`nor_county_map_b2019_default_sf`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_default_sf.md)
  [`nor_county_map_b2017_default_sf`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_default_sf.md)
  : Maps of Norwegian counties in sf format
- [`nor_county_map_b2024_insert_oslo_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_insert_oslo_dt.md)
  [`nor_county_map_b2020_insert_oslo_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_insert_oslo_dt.md)
  [`nor_county_map_b2019_insert_oslo_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_insert_oslo_dt.md)
  [`nor_county_map_b2017_insert_oslo_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_insert_oslo_dt.md)
  [`nor_county_position_geolabels_b2024_insert_oslo_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_insert_oslo_dt.md)
  [`nor_county_position_geolabels_b2020_insert_oslo_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_insert_oslo_dt.md)
  [`nor_county_position_geolabels_b2019_insert_oslo_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_insert_oslo_dt.md)
  [`nor_county_position_geolabels_b2017_insert_oslo_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_insert_oslo_dt.md)
  : Maps of Norwegian counties with an insert for Oslo in data.table
  format
- [`nor_county_map_b2024_split_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_split_dt.md)
  [`nor_county_map_b2020_split_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_split_dt.md)
  [`nor_county_position_geolabels_b2024_split_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_split_dt.md)
  [`nor_county_position_geolabels_b2020_split_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_split_dt.md)
  [`annotate_oslo_nor_map_bxxxx_split_dt()`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_split_dt.md)
  : Split map of Norwegian counties in data.table format

## Municipality-level maps

Maps of Norwegian municipalities with different layouts and coordinate
systems

- [`nor_municip_map_b2024_default_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_municip_map_bxxxx_default_dt.md)
  [`nor_municip_map_b2020_default_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_municip_map_bxxxx_default_dt.md)
  [`nor_municip_map_b2019_default_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_municip_map_bxxxx_default_dt.md)
  [`nor_municip_position_geolabels_b2024_default_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_municip_map_bxxxx_default_dt.md)
  [`nor_municip_position_geolabels_b2020_default_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_municip_map_bxxxx_default_dt.md)
  [`nor_municip_position_geolabels_b2019_default_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_municip_map_bxxxx_default_dt.md)
  : Maps of Norwegian municipalities in data.table format
- [`nor_municip_map_b2024_default_sf`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_municip_map_bxxxx_default_sf.md)
  [`nor_municip_map_b2020_default_sf`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_municip_map_bxxxx_default_sf.md)
  [`nor_municip_map_b2019_default_sf`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_municip_map_bxxxx_default_sf.md)
  : Maps of Norwegian municipalities in sf format
- [`nor_municip_map_b2024_insert_oslo_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_municip_map_bxxxx_insert_oslo_dt.md)
  [`nor_municip_map_b2020_insert_oslo_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_municip_map_bxxxx_insert_oslo_dt.md)
  [`nor_municip_map_b2019_insert_oslo_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_municip_map_bxxxx_insert_oslo_dt.md)
  [`nor_municip_position_geolabels_b2024_insert_oslo_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_municip_map_bxxxx_insert_oslo_dt.md)
  [`nor_municip_position_geolabels_b2020_insert_oslo_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_municip_map_bxxxx_insert_oslo_dt.md)
  [`nor_municip_position_geolabels_b2019_insert_oslo_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_municip_map_bxxxx_insert_oslo_dt.md)
  : Maps of Norwegian municipalities with an insert for Oslo in
  data.table format
- [`nor_municip_map_b2024_split_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_municip_map_bxxxx_split_dt.md)
  [`nor_municip_map_b2020_split_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_municip_map_bxxxx_split_dt.md)
  : Split map of Norwegian municipalities in data.table format

## Oslo ward maps

Detailed maps of Oslo city wards (bydeler)

- [`oslo_ward_map_b2024_default_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/oslo_ward_map_bxxxx_default_dt.md)
  [`oslo_ward_map_b2020_default_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/oslo_ward_map_bxxxx_default_dt.md)
  [`oslo_ward_position_geolabels_b2024_default_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/oslo_ward_map_bxxxx_default_dt.md)
  [`oslo_ward_position_geolabels_b2020_default_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/oslo_ward_map_bxxxx_default_dt.md)
  : Map of Oslo wards (bydeler) in data.table format
- [`oslo_ward_map_b2020_default_sf`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/oslo_ward_map_bxxxx_default_sf.md)
  [`oslo_ward_map_b2024_default_sf`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/oslo_ward_map_bxxxx_default_sf.md)
  : Map of Oslo wards (bydeler) in sf format

## Positioning and utilities

Helper datasets and functions for map annotations and labels

- [`nor_xxx_position_title_insert_oslo_b2024_insert_oslo_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_xxx_position_title_insert_oslo_bxxxx_insert_oslo_dt.md)
  [`nor_xxx_position_title_insert_oslo_b2020_insert_oslo_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_xxx_position_title_insert_oslo_bxxxx_insert_oslo_dt.md)
  [`nor_xxx_position_title_insert_oslo_b2019_insert_oslo_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_xxx_position_title_insert_oslo_bxxxx_insert_oslo_dt.md)
  [`nor_xxx_position_title_insert_oslo_b2017_insert_oslo_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_xxx_position_title_insert_oslo_bxxxx_insert_oslo_dt.md)
  : Position of a title for the Oslo insert
- [`nor_county_map_b2024_split_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_split_dt.md)
  [`nor_county_map_b2020_split_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_split_dt.md)
  [`nor_county_position_geolabels_b2024_split_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_split_dt.md)
  [`nor_county_position_geolabels_b2020_split_dt`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_split_dt.md)
  [`annotate_oslo_nor_map_bxxxx_split_dt()`](https://niphr.github.io/csmaps/reference/nor_county_map_bxxxx_split_dt.md)
  : Split map of Norwegian counties in data.table format
